description: Export the river network of Brazil to a DXF file using gvSIG Desktop. Utilize the country shapefile (/home/ga/gvsig_data/countries/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp) and the rivers shapefile (/home/ga/gvsig_data/rivers/ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp) to identify all river features that intersect the country of Brazil. Save the resulting selection to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/brazil_rivers.dxf.
